glossary.summary: Closed vocabulary for `methodology.xml` files in faion-network. Authors and migration agents MUST pick from this list. Unknown tags fail validation.

tag.name: methodology
tag.purpose: Top-level wrapper. Exactly one per file.
tag.attributes: slug (required, kebab-case, must match folder name)

tag.name: metadata
tag.purpose: Catalog/SEO/filtering data. Stripped before injection into prompts.
tag.children: tier, group, domain, summary, tags, category, difficulty, created, updated, related, requires, superseded-by, applies-to, tools, languages, frameworks, author, source, version, repo-path, github-url

tag.name: tier
tag.purpose: Pricing tier. Exactly one of: free | solo | pro | geek.

tag.name: group
tag.purpose: High-level group: dev | ai | marketing | research | product | pm | ba | ux | comms | infra | sdd | sdlc-ai.

tag.name: domain
tag.purpose: Specific knowledge domain. Folder name of parent skill (e.g. `ai-agents`, `software-developer`, `growth-marketer`).

tag.name: summary
tag.purpose: Short catalog snippet, ≤200 chars. Used in cards, og:description, search results.

tag.name: tags
tag.purpose: Keyword tags for filtering and chip clouds.

tag.name: tag
tag.purpose: One keyword tag, lowercase kebab-case.

tag.name: category
tag.purpose: Sub-category prefix (e.g. `lint`, `test`, `mr`, `gov` for sdlc-ai). Optional.

tag.name: difficulty
tag.purpose: beginner | intermediate | advanced. Optional.

tag.name: created
tag.purpose: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of first authoring.

tag.name: updated
tag.purpose: ISO date of last substantive change.

tag.name: related
tag.purpose: Bidirectional links to peer methodologies.

tag.name: requires
tag.purpose: Prerequisites — methodologies the agent should know first.

tag.name: superseded-by
tag.purpose: Newer alternative that replaces this methodology.

tag.name: ref
tag.purpose: Pointer to another methodology by slug.

tag.name: applies-to
tag.purpose: agents | humans | both. Defaults to `both` if absent.

tag.name: tools
tag.purpose: AI tools this methodology targets.

tag.name: tool
tag.purpose: One tool name (e.g. `claude-code`, `cursor`, `codex`, `aider`, `windsurf`).

tag.name: languages
tag.purpose: Programming languages the methodology applies to.

tag.name: language
tag.purpose: One language identifier (e.g. `python`, `typescript`, `go`, `rust`).

tag.name: frameworks
tag.purpose: Frameworks the methodology applies to.

tag.name: framework
tag.purpose: One framework identifier (e.g. `django`, `react`, `gatsby`, `nestjs`).

tag.name: author
tag.purpose: Origin of the methodology (person, org, paper title).

tag.name: source
tag.purpose: External reference URL or citation.

tag.name: version
tag.purpose: Semver (e.g. `1.2.0`). Optional.

tag.name: repo-path
tag.purpose: Path within faion-network. Auto-derived; do not hand-write.

tag.name: github-url
tag.purpose: Direct GitHub URL. Auto-derived; do not hand-write.

tag.name: content
tag.purpose: The body returned to the agent. Mandatory child: `title`. First narrative child SHOULD be `summary`.

tag.name: title
tag.purpose: Methodology headline. Mandatory. Single line.

tag.name: why
tag.purpose: Rationale — what the methodology solves. Empirical anchor or mechanism.

tag.name: when-to-use
tag.purpose: Concrete triggers. Direct child: `list`/`item` or short prose.

tag.name: when-not-to-use
tag.purpose: Anti-cases. Each item carries one-line reason.

tag.name: how-to
tag.purpose: Step-by-step instructions. Use `list`/`item` or `step` children.

tag.name: step
tag.purpose: One numbered step inside `how-to` or `verify`.

tag.name: warning
tag.purpose: Strong caution about a hazard.

tag.name: section
tag.purpose: Generic escape hatch for content not fitting standard tags. Use sparingly.

tag.name: rule
tag.purpose: Concrete, testable directive the agent must follow.

tag.name: rules
tag.purpose: Group of related rules.

tag.name: statement
tag.purpose: The rule itself, in imperative voice.

tag.name: rationale
tag.purpose: Why the rule exists; empirical anchor or mechanism.

tag.name: example
tag.purpose: Concrete worked example.

tag.name: antipattern
tag.purpose: Failure mode to avoid.

tag.name: description
tag.purpose: Description of an antipattern, file, or concept.

tag.name: reason
tag.purpose: Short reason — used inside antipattern or rule.

tag.name: note
tag.purpose: Short commentary attached to an example or section.

tag.name: files
tag.purpose: Index of file resources (real files in templates/ or scripts/).

tag.name: file
tag.purpose: One real file pointer.
tag.attributes: path (relative to methodology root, required), purpose

tag.name: templates
tag.purpose: Index of templates/ folder contents.

tag.name: template
tag.purpose: One template descriptor.

tag.name: scripts
tag.purpose: Index of scripts/ folder contents.

tag.name: script
tag.purpose: One script descriptor.

tag.name: commands
tag.purpose: CLI command examples.

tag.name: command
tag.purpose: One CLI command line.

tag.name: prompt
tag.purpose: Example LLM prompt template. Wrap body in CDATA when it contains XML/markdown.

tag.name: checklist
tag.purpose: Verification checklist.

tag.name: check
tag.purpose: One checklist item, imperative voice.

tag.name: verify
tag.purpose: Verification procedure (multi-step).

tag.name: reference
tag.purpose: Hard dependency on a file the agent may load (template, script, schema).

tag.name: see-also
tag.purpose: Soft cross-references to related methodologies/external reading.

tag.name: link
tag.purpose: Hyperlink to external resource or peer methodology.

tag.name: p
tag.purpose: Paragraph of plain explanatory prose. Use sparingly — prefer typed elements.

tag.name: text
tag.purpose: Generic text wrapper. Use only when no semantic tag fits.

tag.name: code
tag.purpose: Verbatim source code. ALWAYS wrap body in CDATA.

tag.name: list
tag.purpose: Bullet list of short items where role is uniform.

tag.name: item
tag.purpose: One bullet within a list.

tag.name: term
tag.purpose: Definition term — used inside lists or sections describing vocabulary.
